title: Hardcore Resurrection
description: Adds possibility to resurrect player in hardmode.
body:
## About
Adds the possibility to resurrect the player in hardmode.

## Requires:
* [Cloth Config API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config)

## How to use it?
* Place **curved pumpkin block** on top of **lapis lazuli block**.
* Right-click with **totem of undying** on it.
